serverInfo.name: MoneyMatter Finance Tracker
serverInfo.title: MoneyMatter — Personal Finance MCP Server
serverInfo.description: OAuth-secured read/write access to your MoneyMatter financial data: accounts, transactions (including splits, refunds, transfers, and groups), budgets, subscriptions, categories, tags, cash flow, balance history, spending analytics, and investment portfolios (holdings, cash balances, and investment transactions). Supports creating, editing, and deleting records when the corresponding scopes are granted. Enables natural-language queries and automation of your personal finances.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile (name, email, default currency).

tools.name: get_accounts
tools.description: List the user's financial accounts with balances, types, and currencies.

tools.name: search_transactions
tools.description: Search and filter transactions across accounts by date, category, tag, amount, or merchant.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List spending and income categories, including custom user-defined categories.

tools.name: get_tags
tools.description: List transaction tags used to annotate spending.

tools.name: get_budgets
tools.description: Retrieve active and historical budgets with progress and overspending details.

tools.name: create_budget
tools.description: Create a new budget with an optional spending limit, date range, and linked categories.

tools.name: update_budget
tools.description: Update an existing budget's name, date range, spending limit, or linked categories.

tools.name: delete_budget
tools.description: Permanently delete a budget and all its transaction links.

tools.name: archive_budget
tools.description: Archive or restore a budget (sets status to archived or active).

tools.name: add_transactions_to_budget
tools.description: Manually link transactions to a manual-type budget.

tools.name: remove_transactions_from_budget
tools.description: Unlink transactions from a budget without deleting them.

tools.name: get_budget_spending_stats
tools.description: Spending breakdown by category and time-series of expense vs income for a budget.

tools.name: get_spending_by_categories
tools.description: Aggregate spending by category over a specified date range.

tools.name: get_cash_flow
tools.description: Summarize income vs expenses over a specified date range.

tools.name: get_balance_history
tools.description: Time-series of account balances for a given range and granularity.

tools.name: get_expenses_for_period
tools.description: Summarize expenses for a given time period with breakdowns.

tools.name: get_portfolios
tools.description: List the user's investment portfolios with type, enabled state, and metadata.

tools.name: get_portfolio_summary
tools.description: Portfolio-level aggregates: total value, cost basis, realized and unrealized gains, and cash balances in the user's base currency.

tools.name: get_portfolio_holdings
tools.description: Positions held in a portfolio with market value, cost basis, and realized/unrealized gains. Includes embedded security details.

tools.name: get_portfolio_balances
tools.description: Cash balances held in a portfolio, broken down per currency (original and base-currency equivalents).

tools.name: get_investment_transactions
tools.description: Investment transaction history (buy, sell, dividend, transfer, tax, fee) with security and portfolio details.

tools.name: search_securities
tools.description: Search for securities by ticker or company name. Returns securityId needed for create_investment_transaction.

tools.name: create_portfolio
tools.description: Create a new investment portfolio (requires finance:write scope).

tools.name: update_portfolio
tools.description: Update portfolio name, type, description, or enabled state (requires finance:write scope).

tools.name: delete_portfolio
tools.description: Permanently delete a portfolio and optionally all its data (requires finance:delete scope).

tools.name: create_investment_transaction
tools.description: Record a new investment transaction (buy, sell, dividend, fee, etc.) in a portfolio (requires finance:write scope).

tools.name: update_investment_transaction
tools.description: Update an existing investment transaction's category, date, quantity, price, or fees (requires finance:write scope).

tools.name: delete_investment_transaction
tools.description: Permanently delete an investment transaction and recalculate affected holding (requires finance:delete scope).

tools.name: adjust_account_balance
tools.description: Set an account to a specific balance by creating an adjustment transaction for the difference.

tools.name: archive_account
tools.description: Archive or unarchive a user account, with full side-effect handling (group removal, subscription unlinking).

tools.name: get_transaction_groups
tools.description: List all transaction groups with aggregate counts and date ranges, or with full embedded transactions.

tools.name: create_transaction_group
tools.description: Create a new transaction group bundling related transactions (e.g. a split bill). Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: update_transaction_group
tools.description: Update the name or note of an existing transaction group. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_transaction_group
tools.description: Permanently delete a transaction group (transactions themselves are kept). Requires finance:delete scope.

tools.name: add_transactions_to_group
tools.description: Add transactions to an existing transaction group. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: remove_transactions_from_group
tools.description: Remove transactions from a group, optionally dissolving it if too few remain. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: get_subscriptions
tools.description: List all subscriptions and recurring bills with frequency, expected amount, and linked transaction count.

tools.name: get_subscription_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve a single subscription with all linked transactions and the computed next expected payment date.

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description: Create a new subscription or recurring bill. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: update_subscription
tools.description: Update fields on an existing subscription or bill. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_subscription
tools.description: Permanently delete a subscription and its transaction links. Requires finance:delete scope.

tools.name: toggle_subscription_active
tools.description: Activate or deactivate a subscription to include or exclude it from upcoming payment calculations. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: detect_subscription_candidates
tools.description: Scan past 12 months of transactions to detect recurring payment patterns. Cached for 1 hour. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: list_subscription_candidates
tools.description: List auto-detected subscription candidates sorted by confidence score.

tools.name: dismiss_subscription_candidate
tools.description: Dismiss a pending subscription candidate so it no longer appears in the list. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: link_transactions_to_subscription
tools.description: Link transactions to a subscription to mark them as payment instances. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: unlink_transactions_from_subscription
tools.description: Unlink transactions from a subscription without deleting them. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: get_upcoming_subscription_payments
tools.description: List upcoming subscription payments sorted by next expected payment date.

tools.name: get_subscriptions_summary
tools.description: Aggregate estimated monthly and projected yearly cost across all active subscriptions in the user's base currency.

tools.name: create_transaction
tools.description: Create a new income, expense, or transfer transaction with optional splits, tags, and category.

tools.name: update_transaction
tools.description: Update an existing transaction's amount, date, category, tags, note, or splits. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_transaction
tools.description: Permanently delete a transaction. For transfers, both sides are deleted. Requires finance:delete scope.

tools.name: bulk_update_transactions
tools.description: Update multiple transactions at once — set category, note, or add/replace/remove tags. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: split_transaction
tools.description: Split a transaction across multiple categories; amounts must sum to the transaction total. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_split
tools.description: Delete a single split from a transaction by its split ID. Requires finance:delete scope.

tools.name: link_transfer
tools.description: Link two existing transactions as a transfer pair (opposite types, different accounts). Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: unlink_transfer
tools.description: Unlink a transfer pair by transferId; both transactions become independent entries. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: link_refund
tools.description: Mark an existing transaction as a refund of another transaction. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: unlink_refund
tools.description: Remove a refund link between two transactions. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: assign_tags_to_transaction
tools.description: Assign one or more tags to a transaction; already-assigned tags are silently skipped. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: remove_tags_from_transaction
tools.description: Remove tags from one or more transactions. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: create_category
tools.description: Create a new transaction category, optionally nested under a parent. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: update_category
tools.description: Rename, recolor, or change the icon of a category. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_category
tools.description: Permanently delete a category; supply replaceWithCategoryId to reassign linked transactions. Requires finance:delete scope.

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag that can be assigned to transactions. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: update_tag
tools.description: Rename, recolor, or update the description of a tag. Requires finance:write scope.

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Permanently delete a tag and unlink it from all transactions. Requires finance:delete scope.

prompts.name: financial_data_guide
prompts.description: Guide for working with MoneyMatter's financial data, including data model and common query patterns.
